title: Automatic Ore No More: Spelunkery
description: Disable Spelunkery's ore farming with Sluices.
body:
Lightweight Data Pack disabling ore nugget generation with Spelunkery's Sluices.

This Data Pack removes passive ore nugget chances from Sluices by editing their loot tables.

Known bug: JEI/EMI will still display all items, because the recipes are hard-coded into the mod. But items will no longer generate.
